title: Iran is a huge headache for China, but bodes ill for Taiwan
summary_full: An even more fractured Transatlantic Alliance as a consequence of the situation in the Middle East can only be to Beijing's benefit
summary_public: An even more fractured Transatlantic Alliance as a consequence of the situation in the Middle East can only be to Beijing's benefit

IR.label: negative
